validation.name_rule: Start with a letter, and use lowercase letters, numbers, or underscores only
validation.cn_name_rule: Use Chinese characters, letters, or underscores only
validation.property_name_rule: Use Chinese characters, letters, numbers, or underscores only
validation.normal_name_rule: Use Chinese characters, letters, numbers, or underscores only, up to 48 characters
validation.jdbc_rule: Enter a valid JDBC URL, for example: jdbc:mysql://127.0.0.1:3306/db_name
validation.account_name_rule: Account name must be within 16 characters and cannot start or end with an underscore
validation.favorite_name_rule: Use Chinese characters, letters, numbers, or underscores only, up to 48 characters
